root_cause: Kubelet certificate expired or not yet valid
evidence: Certificate validity error is present in kubelet/node status signal
Pod is assigned to node node1
Timeline contains kubelet or node-controller event showing x509 certificate validity failure

causes.message: Kubelet certificate is expired or not yet valid for API communication
Kubelet cannot maintain node status because its certificate validity has failed
Node health reporting and workload management are impaired by kubelet certificate failure

node:node1: Ready condition=False reason=KubeletNotReady with certificate validity failure
pod:node-agent-affected-pod: Pod is affected by kubelet certificate expiry on its node

likely_causes: Node clock skew makes the certificate appear not yet valid
Kubelet cannot authenticate to the API server due to x509 validity failure
suggested_checks: Check kubelet certificate expiration and rotation status on the node
Inspect kubelet logs for x509 or certificate rotation errors
